code:
import io
import string

fn abs_val(_ x: Int) -> Int
  if x < 0
    -x
  else
    x
  end
end

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(l)
    l
  when None
    ""
  end

  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line)
  let n = tokens.len()

  if n == 0
    Err("no input")
  else
    let first_str = match tokens.get(0)
    when Some(s)
      s
    when None
      "0"
    end

    let first_val = match string.parse_int(first_str)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end

    mut min_val = first_val
    mut min_abs = abs_val(first_val)
    mut i = 1

    while i < n
      let tok = match tokens.get(i)
      when Some(s)
        s
      when None
        "0"
      end

      let v = match string.parse_int(tok)
      when Some(x)
        x
      when None
        0
      end

      let av = abs_val(v)
      if av < min_abs
        min_val = v
        min_abs = av
      end

      i = i + 1
    end

    print("min_abs=#{min_val}")
    Ok(())
  end
end
